heading: Purposes of the Acquisition Planning District
label: 460ooo–2 Purposes of the Acquisition Planning District

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall negotiate with land owners for the acquisition of lands and interest in lands suitable for Conservation Area expansion that meet the purposes described in section 460–3(a) of this title. The Secretary shall only acquire property under this subchapter pursuant to section 460–6 of this title.oooooo

children.heading: Federal lands
children.label: b Federal lands
children.text: The Secretary, through the Bureau of Land Management, shall administer the public lands within the Acquisition Planning District pursuant to this subchapter and the applicable provisions of the Federal Land Policy and Management Act of 1976 ( et seq.), subject to valid existing rights, and in accordance with the management plan. Such public lands shall become part of the Conservation Area when they become contiguous with the Conservation Area.43 U.S.C. 1701

children.heading: Fish and wildlife
children.label: c Fish and wildlife
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter shall be construed as affecting the jurisdiction or responsibilities of the State of Arizona with respect to fish and wildlife within the Acquisition Planning District.

children.heading: Protection of State and private lands and interests
children.label: d Protection of State and private lands and interests
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter shall be construed as affecting any property rights or management authority with regard to any lands or interest in lands held by the State of Arizona, any political subdivision of the State of Arizona, or any private property rights within the boundaries of the Acquisition Planning District.

children.heading: Public lands
children.label: e Public lands
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter shall be construed as in any way diminishing the Secretary’s or the Bureau of Land Management’s authorities, rights, or responsibilities for managing the public lands within the Acquisition Planning District.

children.heading: Coordinated management
children.label: f Coordinated management
children.text: The Secretary shall coordinate the management of the public lands within the Acquisition Planning District with that of surrounding county, State, and private lands consistent with the provisions of subsection (d).
